arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. Spurs: Mohamed Salah out to break another personal milestone in EFL Cup tie
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah will be looking to break another personal milestone when Liverpool face Tottenham Hotspur in the second leg of their EFL Cup semi-final on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: Liverpool agree deal with eight-goal striker who was spotted at grassroots level
arts.sum: Josh Sonni-Lambie has signed a contract with Liverpool after impressing at youth level

arts.ttl: Nine Tottenham players guaranteed to miss Liverpool Carabao Cup clash amid injury crisis
arts.sum: Odobert is in a group of players who are expected back soon, but the game against Liverpool is expected to come too early. Ahead of the game, Spurs have been handed a big injury blow with the news that Radu Dragusin has suffered a serious knee injury that will rule him out for the remainder of the season.

arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham risk losing teenager viewed as 'key part of their future' to AC Milan or Juventus
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have a teenager academy star who is being targeted by some of the biggest Italian clubs and they are keen to keep hold...

arts.ttl: Wrexham chief snubs Roberto Mancini and Liverpool icon's son for 'the best' Phil Parkinson
arts.sum: Wrexham manager Phil Parkinson has been lavished with praise by the club's chief executive, who has compared him favourably to Roberto Mancini and two sons of legends

arts.ttl: Gary Neville makes bold Liverpool vs Tottenham prediction for 'emotional, mad night'
arts.sum: Liverpool have work to do if they want to reach the Carabao Cup final in Arne Slot’s first season at Anfield and Gary Neville has given his prediction ahead of Thursday’s clash

arts.ttl: 'I hope': Manager who publicly mocked Ange Postecoglou states what he wants Tottenham to do
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have been told what they should do with Ange Postecoglou by Leyton Orient manager Richie Wellens. Wellens was forced to apologise to Postecoglou...

arts.ttl: Liverpool readying €35m swoop for Barcelona star
arts.sum: A member of the midfield ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona has made his way back onto the transfer wishlist of Liverpool. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, citing Caught Offside,…

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea now privately think 'outstanding' player will join them instead of Tottenham in the summer
Premier League CEO issues official update as Liverpool chairman Tom Werner and FSG clash over £242m plot
